column1: # Detection vs per-strain sequencing depth (single C. acnes strain GCF_009737125,
# present in both tools' DBs; simulated shotgun, error-free). 1 = detected, 0 = missed.
# StrainScan run in low-depth modes (-l 2 for <1x, -l 1 at 1x).
# Detection onset: StrainScan ~0.5x, Strain2bScan ~1x (permissive floor) to ~5x (default).
# Sparse 2bRAD markers are less sensitive at low depth; the win is speed/memory at >=~5x.
